name: Classic Pork Belly
steps: Cut to pieces. Roughly 9x18cm (short side to be against grain)
Set Rational to 200. Braise until soft overnight
Place all pork in the gastro, pour in liquid
Into Rational, bring to boil and turn temp down to 95°C for overnight
Pour the lard into separate container and sauce into another
Chop pork 5-10mm into small ice cream containers (against grain)
Reduce sauce by 1/2 upstairs at setting
Cool the sauce and store away
HANDOVER: cut a box of pork into quarters. Bun count. Portion count.
